name: Dashboard
description: Visual-mode-only page. The /dashboard route is a pure client-side redirect (DashboardRedirect): in Visual product mode it resolves to /tools/visual-automation, in AI Dev mode it resolves to /build/workflows. This spec captures the Visual-mode dashboard surface (the Visual Automation projects landing): the page header, the 'Your Projects' section with its create entry point, and the populated project grid (Spec CI seeds a fixture project, so the grid shows the persistent creation cards plus the fixture card rather than the zero-projects empty state). Structure-only — never asserts specific project rows or counts. Reach this view by switching to Visual mode (toggle id 'button-visual-1') before navigating.

states.name: Page header
states.description: Top-of-page banner for the Visual-mode dashboard — always rendered regardless of project data.

assertions.description: h1 anchors the page; matched by id.
Heading text reads 'Visual Automation' (role+text cross-check on the same h1).
Subtitle paragraph anchors the page's purpose.

states.name: Projects section
states.description: The 'Your Projects' section header and its create-new entry point. Always rendered regardless of how many projects exist; this state asserts the section's structural anchors, never specific project rows.

assertions.description: Section h3 names the projects list.
Section heading text reads 'Your Projects' (role+text cross-check).
New Project button is the always-available create entry point in the section header.

states.name: Populated project grid
states.description: Spec CI seeds an empty 'spec-ci-fixture' project on the ci-bot account, so the Visual-mode dashboard renders a populated project grid: the persistent 'New Project' and 'Import Configuration' creation cards plus the seeded fixture project's own card. (Previously this snapshot captured the zero-projects empty state; the seed legitimately changes the account from empty to one-project.) Structure-only — asserts the persistent creation cards and the known fixture card, never arbitrary project rows or counts.

assertions.description: 'New Project' creation card is present in the grid.
'Import Configuration' creation card is present in the grid.
The seeded 'spec-ci-fixture' project card is rendered in the grid.
